data.title: Slidev-Style Presentations
data.subtitle: Zero Build · Static HTML · Beautiful Slides
data.author: Your Name

data.title: Features Overview
data.leftContent:
## What You Get

- 20+ professional layouts
- Code syntax highlighting
- Progressive disclosure
- Visual effects
- Single-file bundling
data.rightContent:
## How It Works

1. Create JSON config
2. Run generator
3. Open in browser
4. (Optional) Bundle
5. Share anywhere

data.title: Code Example
Key Benefits
items: No build tools required - just Node.js

data.quote: The best presentations are the ones that just work.
data.author: Anonymous Developer
data.role: Someone who's tired of complex build systems
